ingestion_policy: Use API or downloadable public data; preserve field names and retrieval date.
allowed_display_behavior: Display summarized numeric indicators with source link and caveats.
notes_and_limitations: Latest available federal data can lag current school pricing and outcomes.

update_cadence: Continuously updated as reported by recognized accrediting agencies
ingestion_policy: Use institution search results or exports when available; record verification date.
allowed_display_behavior: Display accreditation evidence and link users back to the official search.
notes_and_limitations: The Department of Education notes DAPIP data is reported by agencies and is not audited by ED.

ingestion_policy: Use as accreditor-level confirmation together with school disclosures or DAPIP.
allowed_display_behavior: Display accreditor evidence and link to the accreditor directory.
notes_and_limitations: Institution-level pages can move behind directory search interfaces.

ingestion_policy: Store search URL, school name, and verification date; revisit before publication updates.
allowed_display_behavior: Display eligibility as an evidence-linked status, not as visa advice.
notes_and_limitations: School certification does not imply individual admission, visa issuance, CPT, OPT, or STEM OPT approval.

publisher: U.S. Department of Homeland Security / ICE
update_cadence: As DHS updates the STEM Designated Degree Program List
ingestion_policy: Match school-published CIP codes or explicit STEM designation to the DHS list.
allowed_display_behavior: Display STEM OPT evidence only with CIP/source caveat.
notes_and_limitations: A STEM-designated CIP is only one eligibility input; OPT/STEM OPT outcomes are never guaranteed.

ingestion_policy: Prefer official current-year pages; record exact URL and verification date.
allowed_display_behavior: Display summarized facts with direct links to original pages.
notes_and_limitations: Schools can change tuition, fees, scholarships, programs, and admission requirements without notice.

update_cadence: Manual review for pilot records only
ingestion_policy: Summarize themes; avoid login-only, private, deleted, or bulk raw comment reuse.
allowed_display_behavior: Display a short theme summary, optional short excerpt, source link, and caveat that it is not verified fact.
notes_and_limitations: Public comments are anecdotal and can be outdated, biased, or unrepresentative.

publisher: Xiaohongshu, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and Douyin
update_cadence: Generated whenever the school database changes
ingestion_policy: Generate a school-specific platform search URL; do not scrape, republish, rank, or imply verification of user posts.
allowed_display_behavior: Display outbound discovery links with a clear user-generated-content caveat and access note.
notes_and_limitations: Results are personalized and can change by account, region, language, moderation status, and time; some platforms require sign-in or their mobile app.
